headline: How FDA Approval of CardioMEMS Hero Remote Monitor At Abbott (ABT) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Abbott Laboratories recently received FDA approval for its redesigned CardioMEMS Hero remote heart failure monitoring system, featuring a smaller, lighter reader aimed at improving patient convenience and clinical workflows in the US. This approval, supported by existing reimbursement for implantable pulmonary artery pressure sensors, could strengthen Abbott’s position in heart failure management technologies and broaden physician adoption. Next, we’ll examine how the CardioMEMS Hero...

headline: Medtronic Debuts MiniMed Go Smart MDI With Simplera Sensor in Europe
summary: MDT launches MiniMed Go Smart MDI with the Simplera sensor in Europe, advancing connected insulin care as the Diabetes unit's IPO plans progress.
